methodology: Live TraderJoes.com catalog cards captured in the signed-in Seattle store context. Capture is broad across produce, raw meat and seafood, eggs, milk, butter, baking, grains, oils and targeted staple searches; automatic commodity eligibility and strict cross-source matching are applied separately.
